# Mathricks

> Mathricks is an independent game studio that creates math-inspired puzzle games and learning apps.

## About

Mathricks (mathricks.com) is an independent studio focused on building original, math-inspired puzzle games and apps. All titles are available on the Apple App Store. The studio has been active since 2010. The public site also includes a studio blog, company pages and app-specific support resources.


Contact: info @ mathricks.com
Home: https://mathricks.com/
Games Catalog: https://mathricks.com/games.html
Apps Catalog: https://mathricks.com/apps.html
Blog: https://mathricks.com/blog/
Company: https://mathricks.com/company/
Support Center: https://mathricks.com/support/
X/Twitter: https://x.com/mathricks
GitHub: https://github.com/mathricks

## Games

### Bitcoin Puzzle Quest
- Description: A cryptographic puzzle-hunt game. Generate keys offline, climb global leaderboards, and explore the legendary 1000 BTC puzzle in a private playground.
- App Store: https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/bitcoin-puzzle-quest/id6744828717
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/bpq/
- Full Details: https://mathricks.com/bpq/details.html
- Support FAQ: https://mathricks.com/bpq/support/
- Match Explainer: https://mathricks.com/bpq/support/match.html
- Claiming BTC Overview: https://mathricks.com/bpq/support/claim.html
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/bpq/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### Summit Numbers
- Description: A fast number-summation puzzle. Build clean summits using wrap-around movement, keep your streak alive, and share the same climb with friends via social challenge play.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6753334821
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/summit/
- Shared Puzzle Page: https://mathricks.com/summit/play/
- Support: https://mathricks.com/summit/support/
- Story: https://mathricks.com/summit/support/story.html
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/summit/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### Entropy: Zero
- Description: A tactical grid repair puzzle. Restore corrupted systems by placing geometric shapes to repair damaged tiles. Every placement matters. Designed to replace doom-scrolling with focused flow-state play.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757635585
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/entropy/
- Support: https://mathricks.com/entropy/support/
- Story: https://mathricks.com/entropy/support/story.html
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/entropy/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### GridLock Numbers
- Description: A strategy-first number-filling puzzle. Jump double for orthogonal moves, single for diagonals, and master x2 bonus cells to chase high scores.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/gridlock-numbers/id912871295
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/gridlock/
- Support: https://mathricks.com/gridlock/support/
- Story: https://mathricks.com/gridlock/support/story.html
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/gridlock/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### Astrovert
- Description: A cosmic runner arcade game. Guide a cosmic baseball through asteroid belts and stormy atmospheres. Quick reflexes and timing-based gameplay with high-score runs.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/astrovert/id6502262535
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/astrovert/
- Support: https://mathricks.com/astrovert/support/
- Story: https://mathricks.com/astrovert/support/story.html
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/astrovert/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### Countdown Numbers
- Description: An upcoming arithmetic puzzle experience inspired by classic numbers-game formats.
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/countdown/
- Story: https://mathricks.com/countdown/support/story.html
- Status: Coming soon

## Apps

### Der Wortschatz
- Description: A German vocabulary learning app with matching rounds, scrollable practice cards, CEFR levels, prepositions, and noun-verb combinations.
- Overview: https://mathricks.com/der-wortschatz/
- Curriculum Details: https://mathricks.com/der-wortschatz/details.html
- Support: https://mathricks.com/der-wortschatz/support/
- Privacy: https://mathricks.com/der-wortschatz/privacy/
- Platform: iOS

### RMM
- Description: Experimental workspace currently in active iteration.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/rmm/
- Status: Lab / In development

## Editorial

### Blog Index
- Description: The Mathricks blog with essays on puzzle design, game mechanics, and development.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/blog/

### Why Simple Rules Create Hard Puzzles
- Description: An essay on why puzzle depth comes from the interaction of a few rules, with examples from Sudoku, Wordle, Tetris, Minesweeper, and chess.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/blog/why-simple-rules-create-hard-puzzles.html
- Published: 2026-05-18

### Company Overview
- Description: Studio overview, culture summary, and links to company resources.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/company/

### Workplace Policy
- Description: Mathricks' remote-first operating model, values, and working principles.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/company/workplace-policy.html

### Privacy Policy
- Description: Company-level privacy and data-handling policy for Mathricks.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/company/privacy-policy.html

### Terms of Service
- Description: Terms, usage rules, intellectual property, conduct, and liability language for Mathricks games and services.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/company/terms-of-service.html

## Support

### Support Center
- Description: Main support hub for product feedback, bug reports, and account questions.
- Page: https://mathricks.com/support/

- Astrovert: https://mathricks.com/astrovert/support/
